results.title: Commerce announces Summer in the City event, holiday closures
results.description: The City of Commerce will host its annual Summer in the City Celebration on Saturday, June 27. The event will feature activities throughout the day, culminating with a fireworks display

results.title: SeatGeek Snags Wild Ticket Power At St. Paul’s Grand Casino Arena
results.description: Minnesota Wild is moving Grand Casino Arena ticketing to SeatGeek starting July 1, 2026. Existing tickets remain valid and fans will get transfer instructions.

results.title: Turning the AI job disruption into a startup pipeline
results.description: Israeli-founded platform Tailor Brands says it helps laid-off workers, freelancers and creators handle business registration, tax IDs, compliance and other back-office tasks as more Americans turn to self-employment

results.title: Topcobe 225K BTU Triple-Burner Outdoor Cooker 48% Off
results.description: The Topcobe three-burner propane cooker drops to $96.99 from $185.96 at Walmart. Get 225,000 BTU cooking power for seafood boils, canning, and outdoor events.

results.title: Florida ranks high for elder fraud as issue affects over 88,000 a year
results.description: The number of older adults scammed out of $10,000 or more in the US has more than quadrupled since 2020, according to the Federal Trade Commission.

results.title: Newsom, Lawmakers Agree on $11 Billion Housing Bond for November Ballot
results.description: Gov. Gavin Newsom and the Legislature announced Monday that they have agreed to place an $11.25 billion affordable housing and homeownership bond on the November ballot. The Veterans and Affordable Housing Bond Act of 2026 would fast-track the construction, rehabilitation, and preservation of affordable housing, support homeownership programs, and provide funding for a variety of state [...] The post Newsom, Lawmakers Agree on $11 Billion Housing Bond for November Ballot appeared first on GV Wire .

Bulletin Board: DEKA STRONG fitness competition coming to Orange
results.description: The Athol Area YMCA has a DEKA STRONG fitness competition coming to Orange on July 18. Created by Spartan, DEKA is a popular format that tests strength, endurance, power and overall conditioning. “Bringing DEKA STRONG to Orange reflects our commitment to providing innovative health and wellness opportunities for our community,” said Liz Day, Healthy Living [...]
